images.title: Prologue
images.description: Remnants of what remains. How did this happen?

images.title: Chapter 1 - Blitz
images.description: Chris engaged in simulated battle scenarios during the military training for the Light Skipper's crew.

images.description: Chris and his brother Josh enjoying time together after Chris returns from a long deployment.

images.title: Chapter 3 - Discovery
images.description: The first visual confirmation of the habitable world Catora — humanity's long-awaited discovery of a new home beyond Earth.

images.title: Chapter 4 - The Long Sleep
images.description: The Light Skipper being prepared for deployment.

images.title: Chapter 4 - The Long Sleep
images.description: The trip would be spent in cryogenic sleep pods for 2 years.

images.title: Chapter 5 - Arrival
images.description: It would take a while for Chris to get used to these new uniforms.

images.title: Chapter 5 - Arrival
images.description: The view reminded Chris of Earth, but not quite.

images.title: Chapter 6 - Planetfall
images.description: Weightless for the first time.

images.title: Chapter 6 - Planetfall
images.description: First steps onto an alien world.

images.title: Chapter 6 - Planetfall
images.description: Your first alien creature, a Mud Frog!

images.description: Mission debriefing after first planetfall.

images.title: Chapter 7 - New Frontier
images.description: Nunez gets a little too familiar with the UTV.

images.description: Chung is surprised by one of the native animals.

images.title: Chapter 8 - Forward Operating Base
images.description: The Light Skipper transitions to the surface.

images.title: Chapter 9 - First Month Down
images.description: Kat interrupts Chris and Josh's lunch.

images.title: Chapter 9 - First Month Down
images.description: Ah, the Skamp. Not so scary after all.

images.title: Chapter 9 - First Month Down
images.description: A small pack of Laredo Dragons corner the Falcon Team.

images.description: The source of the anomaly.

images.title: Chapter 10 - Not The First
images.description: Analysing the familiar script etched into the obelisk.

images.title: Chapter 11 - Research Base Alpha
images.description: Everything looks more incredible in the light.

images.title: Chapter 12 - Even Bigger
images.description: The second anomaly turns out to be more than they imagined.

images.title: Chapter 12 - Even Bigger
images.description: The monstrosity was more akin to the great dinosaurs of Earth than to anything else he had ever seen.

images.title: Chapter 13 - Recovery
images.description: Chris's subconscious mind flashed to an image of the broken soldier bleeding out inside the obelisk.

images.title: Chapter 13 - Recovery
images.description: Walking up in the medbay.

images.description: Chris tries to move forward with his recovery.

images.title: Chapter 14 - Back At It
images.description: Josh reveals his surprise.

images.description: Overlooking the changes to Research Base Alpha.

images.description: Checking in on the changes to Research Base Bravo.

images.title: Chapter 15 - Liam's Knowledge

images.title: Chapter 16 - The Millennium War
images.description: The Aku'Ra species' first contact with outsiders.

images.title: Chapter 16 - The Millennium War
images.description: Optio Turas sprinting through the city park. 459th Annual of the war.

images.title: Chapter 16 - The Millennium War
images.description: Praetor Turfish is prepared for his final battle. One way or another, this war ends today.

images.title: Chapter 17 - Ruins
images.description: Chris and his team prepare for another expedition.

images.title: Chapter 17 - Ruins
images.description: Schumacher finds a relic from the past Sepu civilization.

images.title: Chapter 18 - Conspiracy Theory
images.description: Liam explains Earth's forgotten past.

images.title: Chapter 18 - Conspiracy Theory
images.description: Chris and Liam design Liam's new avatar.

images.title: Chapter 19 - Captured Energy
images.description: Preparing to activate the Sepu power station.

images.title: Chapter 19 - Captured Energy
images.description: Chris and his team encounter a Tarlon hunt for a baby Fapu.

images.description: The appearance of the enemy.

images.title: Chapter 20 - Unwanted Surprise
images.description: That's a Svixen?

images.title: Chapter 21 - Unexpected Friendship
images.description: Hiding out from the Svixen in a cave at an abandoned mine.

images.title: Chapter 21 - Unexpected Friendship
images.description: Chris is approached by an unexpected visitor.

images.title: Chapter 22 - Timing is Everything
images.description: Finally, contact from the Light Skipper.

images.title: Chapter 22 - Timing is Everything
images.description: The cavebound team leaves to meet up with the Light Skipper.

images.title: Chapter 22 - Timing is Everything
images.description: Now that the crew is back together, they prepare to leave the Galus system.

images.title: Chapter 23 - Redirected
images.description: The Light Skipper is struck and the Svixen Regulas Class ship appears out of nowhere.

images.title: Chapter 23 - Redirected
images.description: The Falcon's prepare for battle and to flee the Light Skipper.

images.title: Chapter 24 - Retreat
images.description: The Light Skipper is out of control and falling back to Catora.

images.title: Chapter 24 - Retreat
images.description: The mining vessel Chris was on is now a crash site in the forest.

images.title: Chapter 24 - Retreat
images.description: Davis's team is ambushed in the forest by a small pack of Sveri Sku.

images.title: Chapter 25 - Skrema
images.description: Our second vehicle crash in as many hours.

images.title: Chapter 25 - Skrema
images.description: The Svixen are no longer holding back. They send in their Sveri Sku. Chris recognizes them as devolved Sepu.

images.title: Chapter 25 - Skrema
images.description: The explosion destroyed the wall and the Sveri Sku begin to overwhelm the crew.

images.title: Chapter 26 - To the Death
images.description: Chris confronts the group of Svixen that approach.

images.title: Chapter 26 - To the Death
images.description: Chris and Gatuum fight to the death.

images.title: Chapter 26 - To the Death
images.description: Semula Breven declares Chris's victory, and Earth's future loss.

images.title: Chapter 27 - Survivors
images.description: Carmelo is found covered in the rubble of the destroyed LSPD wall.

images.title: Epilogue
images.description: Chris and Fenrir make it to the FOB in search for medical supplies.

images.title: Epilogue
images.description: Chris tries to coax Fenrir into riding in the back of the UTV.

images.title: Prologue
images.description: I was not born. I was created.

images.title: Prologue
images.description: Chris, Liam, and Fenrir rush to return to the cave with medical supplies.

images.title: Chapter 1 - After the Fire
images.description: Chris makes it back to the cave hideout with supplies for Morgan's wounds.

images.title: Chapter 1 - After the Fire
images.description: Chris sits around the fire with Combat Specialist Davis and Tech Specialist Linkenbach.

images.description: Overlooking the crashsite of the Light Skipper.

images.title: Chapter 2 - Enhancements
images.description: Chris collects more nanites from the podium at Research Base Bravo.

images.title: Chapter 2 - Enhancements
images.description: The crew finds a surprise while searching the crashed Light Skipper for supplies.

images.title: Chapter 3 - Rebuilding
images.description: Liam and Chris explain their plans moving forward.

images.description: Chris and Liam, along with Rowley, leave Catora for the first trantion.

images.description: A radar contact is picked up by Liam.

images.description: Liam shows Rowley and Chris an up-close-view of the destruction of the scout ship.

images.description: Josh and Carmelo notice a change in the lighting of the Transync Station.

images.title: Chapter 5 - Activating the Trantions

images.description: The Transync portal opens with unexpected visitors.

images.title: Chapter 6 - Abducted
images.description: Chris and Rowley return to Catora safely.

images.title: Chapter 6 - Abducted
images.description: Liam shows everyone the video of the Maaket arriving through the Transync portal.

images.description: Chris and his team step into the Tual Transync Station and surprise the Maaket on duty.

images.title: Chapter 7 - The Other Side
images.description: Chris surprises a Maaket while testing his suit's new capabilities.

images.title: Chapter 7 - The Other Side
images.description: Chris and his team surrender to the Maaket guards.

images.title: Chapter 8 - Meeting Royalty
images.description: Chris, Morgan, Lemmon and Robertson wait in the Maaket holding cell in the palace.

images.title: Chapter 8 - Meeting Royalty
images.description: The team is taken to the throne room to meet Princess Cashy and her entourage.

images.title: Chapter 9 - Decisions to Make
images.description: Liam shows off his emerging personality quirks.

images.title: Chapter 9 - Decisions to Make
images.description: The team review their options for Transync connections.

images.title: Chapter 9 - Decisions to Make
images.description: Liam reveals the species that await them on the planet Seutor.

images.title: Chapter 10 - Ambushed
images.description: Miller tries to catch Fenrir as he barrels toward Chris.

images.title: Chapter 10 - Ambushed
images.description: Chris looks back in surprise at the gate he expected to be inside a Transync Station.

images.title: Chapter 10 - Ambushed
images.description: The team is ambushed in the Seutor jungle by a group of Natuul.

images.title: Chapter 10 - Ambushed
images.description: The team arrives to the Calores region Transync station and finds it in disarray.

images.title: Chapter 10 - Ambushed
images.description: Chris sneaks up on the first Tuaca hiding out in the dilapidated building.

images.title: Chapter 11 - Calores Region Safehouse
images.description: The team travels to the Tuaca safehouse with Tivay and Posis.

images.title: Chapter 11 - Calores Region Safehouse
images.description: The steampunk-looking safehouse is not what the humans expected.

images.title: Chapter 11 - Calores Region Safehouse
images.description: The team is taking a quick break as Patron Rohga enters the small waiting room.

images.title: Chapter 12 - Seutor's Flora... and Fauna
images.description: The jungle flora comes to life when the sun goes down.

images.title: Chapter 12 - Seutor's Flora... and Fauna
images.description: The group comes across signs of the Svixen attacks in the jungle on their way to Lesfer Spaceport.

images.title: Chapter 12 - Seutor's Flora... and Fauna
images.description: Tivay is attacked by a local creature called a Vyasin.

images.title: Chapter 13 - Lesfer Spaceport
images.description: The jungle ahead opens up to reveal a massive canyon.

images.title: Chapter 13 - Lesfer Spaceport
images.description: Guardian Phostop and his guards greet the group of travelers just inside the city gates.

images.title: Chapter 13 - Lesfer Spaceport
images.description: Guardian Phostop discusses the recent attack, and the state of the damaged spaceport.

images.title: Chapter 14 - Full Control
images.description: Liam uses Chris as a battering ram to punch through a nearby wall.

images.title: Chapter 14 - Full Control
images.description: The group assesses the situation once Liam relinquishes control.

images.title: Chapter 14 - Full Control
images.description: The aftermath of the missile strike is as devestating as the attack.

images.title: Chapter 14 - Full Control
images.description: Chris absorbs the images on the holodisplays that show the overwhelming battle in the city outside. Liam helps translate.

images.title: Chapter 14 - Full Control
images.description: Chris and his team confront a pack of the invading Svixen.

images.title: Chapter 15 - New Toy
images.description: A new Svixen commander approaches after killing one of his own warriors.

images.title: Chapter 15 - New Toy
images.description: Warlord Tagonis Riveen prepares himself for battle and calls for his ship as a whitness.

images.title: Chapter 15 - New Toy
images.description: Chris's skrema with Warlord Riveen begins.

images.title: Chapter 15 - New Toy
images.description: Chris allows his opponent to collect his weapon.

images.title: Chapter 15 - New Toy
images.description: Warlord Riveen admits his defeat. Liam marks the location of Chris's final strike.

images.title: Chapter 16 - Politics
images.description: Phostop expresses his anger with Chris.

images.title: Chapter 16 - Politics
images.description: The team waits next to their new rides, the Tuaca Ground Runners.

images.description: The team leaves the Transync station to meet with the rest of the crew.

images.title: Chapter 17 - Round Trip
images.description: Fenrir marks out a suspicious crate.

images.title: Chapter 17 - Round Trip
images.description: Liam helps Chris navigate the winding canyon road to Lesfer.

images.title: Chapter 17 - Round Trip
images.description: The crew get their first glimpse into the destroyed tunnels of the spaceport hangars.

images.title: Chapter 17 - Round Trip
images.description: Chris spots their ride home through the rubble as the tunnel opens into the underground hangar.
